# Agents-Memory

> Shared Engineering Brain for AI coding agents — Memory + Standards + Planning + Validation

## Purpose

让 AI Agent 在构建代码时持续自我进化，并共享统一工程上下文——错误记录、规则升级、planning workflow、验证门禁一起进入可执行系统。

## Repository Map

```
Agents-Memory/
├── index.md                        # HOT runtime file, locally generated from templates, gitignored
├── llms.txt                        # 机器可读的项目结构地图（本文件）
├── README.md                       # 人类可读的项目介绍 + 设计方案
├── CONTRIBUTING.md                 # 开源贡献约定 + 最小验证命令
├── LICENSE                         # 开源许可证
│
├── schema/
│   └── error-record.md             # 错误记录 frontmatter + 正文格式规范
│
├── errors/                         # COLD runtime dir: local error records (gitignored except .gitkeep)
│   ├── YYYY-MM-DD-<project>-<seq>.md
│   └── archive/                    # 90 天以上归档记录
│
├── memory/                         # WARM runtime dir: local rules + project registry
│   ├── rules.md                    # local generated rules file, gitignored
│   └── projects.md                 # local project registry, gitignored
│
├── logs/                           # RUNTIME LOGS (gitignored)
│   └── agents-memory.log           # CLI / MCP / 文件写入统一日志
│
├── agents_memory/
│   ├── app.py                      # CLI dispatch entrypoint
│   ├── mcp_app.py                  # MCP server entrypoint
│   ├── runtime.py                  # shared repo context / paths / logger
│   ├── constants.py                # shared constants and defaults
│   ├── cli.py                      # `amem` 包入口
│   ├── logging_utils.py            # CLI + MCP 共享日志配置
│   ├── commands/                   # CLI command registry by capability
│   ├── services/                   # records / projects / integration / planning / profiles / vector logic
│   └── integrations/agents/        # pluggable agent adapters
│
├── profiles/                       # installable project profiles (JSON-subset YAML)
│   ├── python-service.yaml
│   ├── frontend-app.yaml
│   ├── fullstack-product.yaml
│   └── agent-runtime.yaml
│
├── vectors/                        # LOCAL VECTOR INDEX (gitignored)
│   └── errors.lance                # LanceDB 索引，由 embed 命令生成
│
├── docker/
│   ├── docker-compose.yml          # Qdrant 向量数据库（多 Agent 共享场景）
│   └── .env.example                # 环境变量模板
│
├── templates/
│   ├── agents-memory-bridge.instructions.md   # bridge 模板（bridge-install 使用）
│   ├── agents-memory-copilot-instructions.md  # 仓库级 Copilot 激活模板
│   ├── planning/                   # plan-init planning bundle 模板
│   └── profile/                    # profile 级初始化模板
│   ├── index.example.md            # public-safe local hot-tier bootstrap
│   ├── projects.example.md         # public-safe local registry bootstrap
│   ├── rules.example.md            # public-safe local rules bootstrap
│   └── mcp.example.json            # public-safe VS Code MCP example
│
├── docs/
│   ├── README.md                   # 文档入口
│   ├── copilot-auto-activation.md  # Copilot 自动激活设计
│   ├── modular-architecture.md     # 模块化与插件化结构
│   ├── architecture.md             # 架构决策记录（ADR-001 ~ ADR-006）
│   └── ops.md                      # 运维手册：CLI 用法 / MCP / 向量搜索 / Docker
│
│
└── scripts/
  ├── memory.py                   # thin CLI wrapper → agents_memory.app
  └── mcp_server.py               # thin MCP wrapper → agents_memory.mcp_app
```

## Key Files

| File | Role | Loaded By |
|------|------|-----------|
| `index.md` | Local hot-tier summary generated from template | Agent on every session start |
| `memory/rules.md` | Local promoted prevention rules | Agent when domain matches |
| `memory/projects.md` | Local registered projects registry | `sync` and `bridge-install` commands |
| `errors/*.md` | Local full error records | On search hit |
| `schema/error-record.md` | Format spec | Human / Agent when creating records |
| `templates/*.example.*` | Public-safe bootstrap examples | Human / first local run |
| `CONTRIBUTING.md` | Contribution workflow and validation baseline | Human contributors |
| `LICENSE` | Open-source license | Humans / package metadata |
| `scripts/memory.py` | Thin CLI wrapper → `agents_memory.app` | Human / CI |
| `scripts/mcp_server.py` | Thin MCP wrapper → `agents_memory.mcp_app` | AI Agent via tool calls |
| `agents_memory/app.py` | CLI command registry entrypoint | Human / CI |
| `agents_memory/mcp_app.py` | MCP tool registry entrypoint | AI Agent via tool calls |
| `agents_memory/runtime.py` | Shared repo context and paths | CLI / MCP / services |
| `agents_memory/services/*` | Business logic by capability | CLI / MCP / future UIs |
| `profiles/*.yaml` | Installable project contracts | `profile-list/show/apply` |
| `.github/instructions/agents-memory/profile-manifest.json` | Applied profile manifest in target project | `profile-apply`, `profile-check`, `doctor` |
| `templates/profile/*` | Profile bootstrap templates | `profile-apply` |
| `templates/planning/*` | Planning bundle templates | `plan-init` |
| `agents_memory/integrations/agents/*` | Plugin adapters for Copilot / ChatGPT / Claude | Project integration flows |
| `agents_memory/cli.py` | `amem` package entrypoint | Human / CI |
| `agents_memory/logging_utils.py` | Shared structured logging | CLI / MCP |
| `templates/agents-memory-bridge.instructions.md` | Bridge template | `bridge-install` command |
| `templates/agents-memory-copilot-instructions.md` | Repo-wide Copilot activation template | `copilot-setup` / `register` |
| `docker/docker-compose.yml` | Qdrant service | Human (`docker-compose up -d`) |

## CLI Quick Reference

```bash
python3 scripts/memory.py new                          # create error record (interactive)
python3 scripts/memory.py list                         # list active records
python3 scripts/memory.py stats                        # distribution stats
python3 scripts/memory.py search <keyword>             # full-text search  (< 200 records)
python3 scripts/memory.py embed                        # build LanceDB vector index
python3 scripts/memory.py vsearch <query>              # semantic search   (≥ 200 records)
python3 scripts/memory.py promote <id>                 # promote to instruction Gotcha
python3 scripts/memory.py sync                         # push promoted rules → all registered projects
python3 scripts/memory.py copilot-setup [project-id]   # install repo-wide Copilot activation block
python3 scripts/memory.py agent-list                   # list built-in agent adapters
python3 scripts/memory.py agent-setup <agent> [path]   # install a specific agent adapter
python3 scripts/memory.py register [path]              # one-command project registration + default agent + bridge install
python3 scripts/memory.py bridge-install <project-id>  # install bridge instruction in a project
python3 scripts/memory.py mcp-setup [project-id]       # write .vscode/mcp.json for a registered project
python3 scripts/memory.py doctor [project-id]          # verify a project's full integration health
python3 scripts/memory.py plan-init <task-name> [path] # scaffold spec / plan / task-graph / validation bundle
python3 scripts/memory.py plan-check [path]            # validate planning bundles under docs/plans
python3 scripts/memory.py profile-list                 # list installable project profiles
python3 scripts/memory.py profile-show <profile-id>    # show one profile contract
python3 scripts/memory.py profile-apply <id> [path]    # install profile into target project
python3 scripts/memory.py profile-diff <id> [path]     # preview profile install plan
python3 scripts/memory.py standards-sync [path]        # sync profile-managed organization standards into target project
python3 scripts/memory.py profile-check [path]         # verify installed profile consistency
python3 scripts/memory.py docs-check [path]            # validate docs entrypoints plus contract/test/policy drift
python3 scripts/memory.py archive                      # archive old records
python3 scripts/memory.py to-qdrant                    # migrate to shared Qdrant
python3 scripts/memory.py update-index                 # regenerate index.md stats
```

## MCP Server Tools (for AI Agents)

Start server: `python3 scripts/mcp_server.py`
VS Code config: local `.vscode/mcp.json` generated from `templates/mcp.example.json` or via `mcp-setup`

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `memory_get_index()` | Read index.md — call at session start |
| `memory_get_rules(domain)` | Read domain rules |
| `memory_search(query)` | Keyword search across error records |
| `memory_get_error(id)` | Read a specific full error record |
| `memory_record_error(...)` | Create new error record automatically |
| `memory_increment_repeat(id)` | Bump repeat_count on recurrence |
| `memory_list_projects()` | List registered projects |
| `memory_sync_stats()` | Record count + search strategy recommendation |

## Search Strategy

```
records < 200   →  grep-style keyword search  (zero deps, stdlib only)
records ≥ 200   →  LanceDB local vector search (pip install lancedb openai pyarrow)
multi-agent     →  Qdrant shared vector DB     (docker/docker-compose.yml)
```

## Self-Evolution Loop (Continuous Agent Upgrade)

```
error occurs during coding
  → Agent calls memory_record_error(...)   [MCP tool, automatic]
    OR python3 scripts/memory.py new       [CLI, manual]
    ↓ status: new
  → root cause analysis + review          status: reviewed
    ↓
  → repeat_count ≥ 2 OR severity=critical
  → python3 scripts/memory.py promote <id>
    ↓ status: promoted → rule written to instruction file
  → python3 scripts/memory.py sync        push to ALL registered projects
    ↓
  → next Agent session in any project:
      - loads index.md → sees category
      - loads rules.md → reads gotcha
      → error prevented 🎯
```

## Cross-Project Sharing

```
Agents-Memory (hub)
├── memory/projects.md      # local registry: synapse-network, spec2flow, ...
├── sync                    # push promoted rules → project instruction files
└── bridge-install          # install bridge in project's .github/instructions/

Project (spoke) — e.g. Synapse-Network
├── .github/instructions/agents-memory-bridge.instructions.md
│     ↑ installed by bridge-install, tells agent to load index.md at start
├── .github/copilot-instructions.md
│     ↑ installed by github-copilot adapter for repo-wide activation
└── .github/instructions/python.instructions.md
      ↑ auto-updated by sync with new Gotchas
```

## Error Record Schema (frontmatter)

```yaml
id:           YYYY-MM-DD-<project>-<seq>
date:         YYYY-MM-DD
project:      synapse-network | spec2flow | provider-service | gateway | admin-front | gateway-admin | other
domain:       finance | frontend | python | docs | config | infra | other
category:     type-error | logic-error | finance-safety | arch-violation | test-failure |
              docs-drift | config-error | build-error | runtime-error | security
severity:     critical | warning | info
status:       new → reviewed → promoted → archived
promoted_to:  path to instruction file (filled on promote)
repeat_count: integer (increment on recurrence)
tags:         list of keywords
```

## Dependencies

| Feature | Requirement |
|---------|-------------|
| Basic CLI (list/search/new/sync/bridge-install) | Python 3.11+, stdlib only |
| MCP Server | `pip install mcp` + Python 3.11+ |
| Vector index build | `pip install lancedb openai pyarrow` + `OPENAI_API_KEY` |
| Semantic search | Same as above + `vectors/` index built |
| Shared multi-agent | Docker + `pip install qdrant-client` |

## Related Projects

- Public repo note: replace local absolute paths with your own machine paths after clone.
